plugins.description: Reproducible Agent Environment: 20 skills for coding standards enforcement, quality gates, repo scaffolding, repo auditing, semi-formal code reasoning, GitHub activity review, JAX memory/retracing diagnosis, efficient rendering, and domain-specific development (biomechanics, DataJoint, gait analysis, camera models)
